params.name: db_url
params.description: Connection string for the primary property asset database (PostgreSQL/Vector Store).

params.name: seaweedfs_root
params.description: Base storage path for SeaweedFS media asset ingestion (images and 3D splats).

params.name: indexer_timeout_duration
params.description: Maximum time allowed to index a valid asset after upload (RSP-002).

params.name: db_password
params.description: Database authentication password (security-sensitive).

params.name: max_upload_size_mb
params.description: Maximum allowed file size in MB for property asset ingestion.

params.name: offline_buffer_ttl_seconds
params.description: Time-to-live for offline data capture buffers (RSP-003).

params.name: search_db_url
params.description: Connection string for the provider search and bid estimation database.

params.name: ai_agent_endpoint
params.description: API endpoint for the AI Agent Service Provider Search & Matching processing.

params.name: min_match_score
params.description: Minimum relevance score for service provider results to be returned (RSP-004).

params.name: api_secret_key
params.description: API secret key for the matching service (security-sensitive).

params.name: bid_threshold_cents
params.description: Minimum bid amount in cents enforced in UI comparison tables (RSP-005).

params.name: regulatory_db_url
params.description: Connection string for the compliance rules and statutory deadline database.

params.name: deadline_check_interval_seconds
params.description: Frequency (seconds) to monitor statutory deadlines for regulatory obligations (RSP-007).

params.name: ai_extraction_confidence_min
params.description: Minimum confidence score for CC&R and Bylaws AI extraction to be trusted (RSP-006).

params.name: extractor_api_secret
params.description: Secret key for the AI extraction module integration (security-sensitive).

params.name: alert_channel_id
params.description: ID of the default notification channel for compliance alerts.

params.name: workflow_db_url
params.description: Connection string for the Action Items and Workflow State database.

params.name: ui_sync_latency_target_ms
params.description: Target latency to reflect status updates immediately in the UI (RSP-010).

params.name: audit_retention_days
params.description: Retention period for workflow audit log transitions (RSP-009).

params.name: workflow_secret_key
params.description: Secret key for workflow state verification and auth (security-sensitive).

params.name: smtp_host
params.description: SMTP server host for mass email processing (RSP-011).

params.name: smtp_port
params.description: SMTP server port for email delivery.

params.name: twilio_account_sid
params.description: Twilio Account SID for SMS communication (RSP-011).

params.name: twilio_auth_token
params.description: Twilio API authentication token for SMS (security-sensitive).

params.name: retry_max_attempts
params.description: Maximum number of delivery attempts for bounce tracking.

params.name: retry_window_hours
params.description: Total window in hours to resume delivery attempts upon reconnection (RSP-012).

params.name: notification_service_secret
params.description: Secret key for the notification dispatcher service (security-sensitive).

params.name: auth_provider_endpoint
params.description: Endpoint for the multi-tenant security and authorization gateway.

params.name: jwt_signing_secret
params.description: Secret key used to sign and validate JWT tokens (security-sensitive).

params.name: rls_policy_store_url
params.description: Connection for storing and querying Row-Level Security policies (RSP-014).

params.name: access_check_timeout_ms
params.description: Maximum time (ms) to enforce unauthorized access responses for restricted data (RSP-015).

params.name: session_timeout_seconds
params.description: Default session timeout duration for authenticated users.

params.name: currency_code
params.description: Default currency code for payment transactions (ISO 4217).

params.name: stripe_api_secret_key
params.description: Stripe API secret key for processing deposits and fees (RSP-016).

params.name: stripe_webhook_secret
params.description: Secret for verifying Stripe payment event signatures (security-sensitive).

params.name: receipt_template_url
params.description: Base URL for generating electronic proof of payment and receipts (RSP-017).

params.name: payment_gateway_timeout_seconds
params.description: Timeout for payment gateway connections before failure.
